title: Recursive workspace discovery
description:
As a Kanbus user
I want workspace-root discovery to find all nested .kanbus.yml projects
So that list/show works without per-project cwd.

Feature: Workspace discovery via .kanbus.yml

Scenario: Workspace root discovers nested projects
  Given a workspace root without a .kanbus.yml file
  And it contains nested repos each with .kanbus.yml
  When project directories are discovered
  Then all nested projects are included

Scenario: Single project root does not recurse
  Given a repo root with a .kanbus.yml file
  When project directories are discovered
  Then only that project is included
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented recursive .kanbus.yml workspace discovery in Rust + Python and updated discovery/project specs. Behave run: project_utilities, project_discovery, issue_show, daemon_error_handling all green.
